conservative.name: Judgement of Vengeance
conservative.requirements: Suffering a critical wound, melee weapon equipped, engaged with target

success.description: You hit for normal damage, plus bonus damage equal to the highest severity amongst critical wounds you suffer from

boon.description: You and your allies within close range may recover an amount of stress equal to the highest severity amongst critical wounds you suffer from, divided as you choose.

reckless.name: Judgement of Vengeance
reckless.requirements: Suffering an insanity, melee weapon equipped, engaged with target

success.description: You hit for normal damage, plus bonus damage equal to the highest severity amongst insanities you suffer from

boon.description: You and your allies within close range may recover an amount of fatigue equal to the highest severity amongst insanities you suffer from, divided as you choose

chaosStar.description: While this card recharges, everyone engaged with you suffers from your insanity
